text.title: Architect Mentoring Curriculum Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 4-step procedure to apply Architect Mentoring Curriculum. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: gap-analysis
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: design-curriculum
step.action: Design 6 monthly phases: each = reading + shadow + facilitate + critique.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: pair-with-mentors
step.action: Assign primary + secondary mentor; book biweekly cadence.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: run-and-review
step.action: Monthly review against rubric; promote when 80%+ items pass.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
